description: Uses PropertyMock to override DBConnection.connected to always be True

code_outputs:
from unittest.mock import patch, PropertyMock

with patch.object(type(DBConnection), 'connected', new_callable=PropertyMock, return_value=True):
    assert DBConnection.connected is True
